content: Self-Refine’s task-focused iterative output tuning and Reflexion’s dynamic memory-enabled long-term self-reflection can be combined to form a hierarchical self-improvement system for autonomous agents, where Self-Refine handles short-cycle task-specific refinement and Reflexion accumulates generalized lessons from past refinement cycles to improve future self-feedback quality. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or supervision while solving its limitation of failing to accumulate learnings across tasks.
